SQLLite.SQL: SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "EmployerDetailsExist" FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA, CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO , PARTIES P WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND GA.CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO EMPLOYER' AND GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 IS NOT NULL AND GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 IS NOT NULL AND P.PARTY_ID = GA.PARTY_ID AND P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME IS NOT NULL
